name: Marcus Hayes
bio: Marcus has 18 years of experience in the life insurance industry and specializes in final expense and whole life policies for seniors on fixed incomes. He has helped over 3,000 families find coverage that fits their budget without sacrificing benefits.

name: Linda Chen
bio: Linda brings 11 years of expertise in term life and guaranteed issue policies, with a focus on clients who have been previously declined due to health conditions. Her patient, no-pressure approach has earned her a 98% client satisfaction rating.

name: David Romero
bio: David leads our carrier comparison process and has 15 years of experience matching clients to the best available rates across dozens of A-rated insurance carriers. He specializes in multi-policy families and estate planning needs.

name: Angela Foster
bio: Angela has 7 years of experience guiding clients through the enrollment process and providing ongoing policy support after approval. She specializes in helping first-time buyers understand their coverage options and navigate claims when needed.
